camp_survey_2026.page_title: Looking Back Together at Gangjeong — 3rd Gangjeong Peace & Music Camp
camp_survey_2026.seo_description: We'd love to hear reflections from everyone who joined the 3rd Gangjeong Peace & Music Camp.
camp_survey_2026.page_hero_subtitle: 3rd Gangjeong Peace & Music Camp — Tell us about those three days
camp_survey_2026.intro: To everyone who spent three days with us in Gangjeong. Whether you were on stage, in the audience, at a market booth, or behind the scenes — thank you for making this camp what it was. To build an even stronger 4th edition, we're asking for a short reflection. It takes about 8 minutes, and the more honest you are, the more it helps. Responses are only seen by the organizing team. Consent to share reviews or photos is collected separately at the bottom.
camp_survey_2026.label_name: Stage name (or group name) or real name
camp_survey_2026.placeholder_name: e.g. Gangjeong Wind Band / Gil-dong Hong
camp_survey_2026.label_role: In what capacity did you join? (Multiple selections allowed — only relevant questions will appear)
camp_survey_2026.consent_quote_named_label: My review (e.g. a one-liner) may be used in promotions with my name attached.
camp_survey_2026.consent_quote_anon_label: My review may be used in promotions anonymously (without my name).
camp_survey_2026.consent_photo_label: Stage photos or videos taken of me during the camp may be used in promotions.
camp_survey_2026.privacy_consent_text: I agree to the collection and use of personal information I have entered (name, contact details, etc.) for the purpose of survey analysis and announcements for the next edition. Responses are accessible only to the organizing team and will be deleted once the purpose is fulfilled.
camp_survey_2026.error_name_required: Please enter your name or group name.
camp_survey_2026.error_privacy_required: You must agree to the collection and use of personal information before submitting.
camp_survey_2026.error_server_missing: Survey server configuration is missing. Please notify the organizing team.
camp_survey_2026.error_submit_failed: Something went wrong during submission. Please try again in a moment or contact the organizing team.
camp_survey_2026.success_page_title: Thank You — Looking Back Together at Gangjeong
camp_survey_2026.success_body: Your precious reflection has been received. The stories you've shared will help us build a stronger 4th camp. Let's sing, let's dance, let's end the war.
camp_survey_2026.q_overall_rating: How satisfied were you with this camp overall?
camp_survey_2026.q_recommend_rating: How likely are you to recommend this camp to others?
camp_survey_2026.q_best_moment: Share one moment you loved most
camp_survey_2026.placeholder_best_moment: A performance, a person, a view — any scene is welcome.
camp_survey_2026.section_operation_desc: These questions are to help us improve the next edition. Feel free to leave any item blank if it doesn't apply to you.
camp_survey_2026.q_timetable_rating: Timetable and flow of the event
camp_survey_2026.q_staff_comm_rating: Communication and responsiveness of staff and volunteers
camp_survey_2026.q_improvement: What was most inconvenient or needs to be fixed for next time?
camp_survey_2026.placeholder_improvement: The more honest, the more helpful.
camp_survey_2026.q_suggestion: Any other ideas or suggestions for the organizing team (optional)
camp_survey_2026.section_open_desc: Questions about the inclusive and open environment this camp aimed to create.
camp_survey_2026.q_genderneutral_restroom_rating: How did you feel about the gender-neutral restroom?
camp_survey_2026.q_open_access_rating: How did you feel about the open-access environment where anyone could come and go without a ticket?
camp_survey_2026.q_genderneutral_restroom_comment: Any thoughts or suggestions about the gender-neutral restroom (optional)
camp_survey_2026.q_open_access_comment: Any thoughts about the ticketless open-access environment (optional)
camp_survey_2026.section_peace_desc: Questions only this camp can ask.
camp_survey_2026.q_peace_comfort_rating: I felt comfortable expressing messages of peace, Gangjeong, and solidarity on stage
camp_survey_2026.q_peace_attitude_rating: Participating in this camp influenced my interest or attitude toward issues of war, peace, and Gangjeong
camp_survey_2026.q_peace_empathy_rating: I resonated with the camp's message of solidarity with Gaza, Gangjeong, and Palestine
camp_survey_2026.q_peace_reflection: If there's anything new you felt or resolved about peace at this camp (optional)
camp_survey_2026.q_rejoin_rating: I would like to join next year's 4th edition
camp_survey_2026.q_recommend_musicians: Please recommend fellow musicians you'd love to share the stage with (optional)
camp_survey_2026.placeholder_recommend_musicians: Group name / contact info or Instagram handle if you know it.
camp_survey_2026.q_one_line_intro: How would you describe this camp to another musician or audience member in one line?
camp_survey_2026.placeholder_one_line_intro: A one-liner that might be quoted in promotions ✨
camp_survey_2026.q_last_words: Anything else you'd like to say to the organizing team (optional)
